**Trajectory assessment:** Saturday 2026-05-09 was a **lit-search-disposition + Saturday-Wolfram + self-awareness-backfill day** — and an **inversion** of yesterday's three-stall-day signature on the execution axis (8/8 fire-rate; 0 stalls; 0 org-limit interrupts) combined with the **densest SYSTEMIC-RISK cycle on record** at the architectural-discipline axis (4 flags, 3 recurrences). The dominant operational signal is the clean execution surface; the dominant architectural signal is the cluster of three independent third-recurrences (PRESUMPTION-105 / 106 / 111) reaching REVISE in the same cycle alongside the second-layer recurrence of PRESUMPTION-115's external-LLM-uptake SYSTEMIC-RISK now at PRESUMPTION-121. Today's 12-to-8 presumption-to-assumption ratio (1.5:1) ties 2026-04-27 and 2026-05-08 as joint-record. **If any one action moves the pipeline forward most**, it is canonizing the SELF-AWARENESS-META cluster's ≤25h stall watchdog as a numbered DECISION-NNN this week (per ASSUMPTION-098 — third-recurrence threshold met) — this empirically closes the predicted-alert-not-implemented loop that has now been observed three times. **If a second**, it is greenlighting the "Core Operational Discipline" architectural sprint (per ASSUMPTION-097) as a Cowork sprint this weekend or next week — bundling the three third-recurrences (registration, canonization, fallback) into a single remediation track. **If a third**, it is writing DECISION-027 (specialist) + DECISION-028 (external-tool-review) as either unified or split per ASSUMPTION-099's framing — the second-layer recurrence of the underlying SYSTEMIC-RISK in 24 hours indicates that scope-extension is not optional. **And if a fourth**, it is shipping the 2-line `extractOverview()` fix in `wiki_narration.html` (ASSUMPTION-090, MONITOR-090) in a non-scheduled Cowork session this weekend — the queueing has now extended to 24+ hours and the smallest-fix-first principle is supported in literature though framing-precision-gap-flagged.
